description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this green shoulder bag from murcia will come in handy. Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall, multiplex or even college. The bag is large enough to accommodate your essentials, plus it's so attractive that you will get appreciative glances all day long.Made of leather for enhanced durability and styleTwo roomy zippered compartments with a small zippered pouch in one compartment, and one zippered pouch at the backTwo handles in braided style for ease of carrying, extra comfort and styleMetal loops to hold one handle, and the other handle stitched to the bag for added style and durabilityBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and durabilityStitch detailing for absolute style Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
